body_txt: Sometimes an author will spend a lot of time blatantly Foreshadowing something, only to play with the audience's heads. When The Reveal comes, the promised (implied, really) development never occurs. Which, by the way, is Irony . May be an Orphaned Reference and/or the result of an Aborted Arc . Here there be spoilers. Compare Sheep in Sheep's Clothing when the Nice Guy is suspected to be not-so-nice, but turns out to be exactly as advertised. See also The Un-Twist , Bait-and-Switch , Red Herring Twist , Red Herring , Red Herring Mole . This trope also includes any and all subversions of Chekhov's Gun ; see that page for examples.
